title: Wickets fly at T20 festival
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union U/13A cricket...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union U/13A cricket team showcased their prowess on Saturday 20 January during a T20 festival hosted by Woodridge College.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union U/13A cricket team showcased their prowess on Saturday 20 January during a T20 festival hosted by Woodridge College."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Opting to bat first after winning the toss in the opening match against St. George's Prep, Union laid the foundation for success.","html":"Opting to bat first after winning the toss in the opening match against St. George's Prep, Union laid the foundation for success."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Despite an early setback, the team rallied with an exceptional 161-run partnership between Dante Mills and Josh Kingwill."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mills contributed a commendable 63 runs, and Kingwill exhibited his skills with a notable 66-run knock, propelling Union to an imposing total of 169/1.","html":"Mills contributed a commendable 63 runs, and Kingwill exhibited his skills with a notable 66-run knock, propelling Union to an imposing total of 169/1."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Union bowlers proved equally formidable in restricting St. George's to 85/6. Hubert Vorster and Aidan Ferreira shone, each claiming two wickets. Union secured a convincing victory, underlining their dominance on the field.","html":"The Union bowlers proved equally formidable in restricting St. George's to 85/6. Hubert Vorster and Aidan Ferreira shone, each claiming two wickets. Union secured a convincing victory, underlining their dominance on the field."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the day's second encounter against Muir College, Union faced a challenging batting stint, managing 99/6 in their allotted 20 overs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite a spirited effort, Muir College emerged victorious with six wickets in hand. Union's resilience was evident, with Ryan Naude taking two crucial wickets.","html":"Despite a spirited effort, Muir College emerged victorious with six wickets in hand. Union's resilience was evident, with Ryan Naude taking two crucial wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although Union faced a setback in the second game, their overall performance showcased grit and determination.","html":"Although Union faced a setback in the second game, their overall performance showcased grit and determination."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Union U/13A cricket team. Photo: Union Facebook page","html":"The Union U/13A cricket team. Photo: Union Facebook page"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
